notes: No text on the main menu. Requires corefonts to be installed in Wine, but no way to do so with Proton.

title: PC Building Simulator

notes: Started up on openGL without menu fonts, once closed creates a crash message and debug log file. Opening again makes steam think it is running but it is not running, can only fix steam by exiting steam.
title: PC Building Simulator

notes: It crashes on exit, but otherwise works fine. I started it with OpenGL.
title: PC Building Simulator

notes: Runs with OpenGL mode. Sometimes it slows down a bit. Display of '3DMark' on customer PCs doesn't work. Screen stays black. But overall playable with restrictions.
title: PC Building Simulator

notes: Mouse stuttering, general stuttering. Crashes occasionally when running 3DMark tests. 3DMark test videos are all black. Freezes when attempting to exit the game.
title: PC Building Simulator

notes: 3.16-4 fixes missing fonts. DXVK crashes loading a level with the dreaded "GetThreadContext failed" error. OpenGL works, but requires Windows Media Foundation to play 3DMark benchmark videos. Crashes on exit. (Side note, wine-tkg-3.19 instantly crashes, likely because of Razer Chroma integration)
title: PC Building Simulator

notes: Update: Any attempt to use the standard "Play Game" option, even if you set -force-opengl in launch arguments, will result in "GetThreadContext Failed". You MUST use the "Play PC Building Simulator (OpenGL)" option to not crash. Still crashes on exit.
title: PC Building Simulator

notes:
After recent update of this game,  the following things happen:
1. Texts not shown in start menu.
2. After entering the game, texts of money, objectives, budget not shown.

In other word, no texts are shown except the main body of emails (excluding objective). After trying to start with opengl, the same thing happens.
title: PC Building Simulator

notes: Updating to the Nvidia 415.18.04 drivers fixed the GetThreadContext errors launching with "Play Game." 3DMark videos still broken, and a slight mouse offset is encountered playing the game. Transform Feedback enabled drivers seem to not have issues with font glyphs.
title: PC Building Simulator

notes: Crashes on exit. Other than that, zero issues.
title: PC Building Simulator

cpu: AMD A12-9720P RADEON R7, 12 COMPUTE CORES 4C+8G
notes: This game is a no-go for my machine, which is an AMD-based laptop (AMD A12 APU + Radeon RX540). All it does is show a popup with a progress bar down at the bottom that, when it reaches the end, the popup goes away, the game syncs up and that's it. Disabling WINED3D11 does nothing and neither does going with OpenGL. Also, tried it with multiple Proton versions (3.7, and 3.16). Maybe PC Building Simulator deserves another chance after it leaves early access, but until then, I'd consider to stay away from it.
